To Do.title: Add strategy results to dashboard
To Do.description: Extend dashboard/app.py with a strategy performance page showing charts and metrics.

Done.title: Token usage tracking & budget monitoring
Done.description: Token manager, cost calculator, Budget & API dashboard tab with agent cost charts, budget guard, and efficiency mode toggle.

Done.title: Build Agent Research Command Center
Done.description: Interactive Streamlit hub with research file browser, clickable kanban, live log stream, and 5-second auto-refresh.

Done.title: Research Gold Market Sentiment & Technicals
Done.description: Fetch XAU/USD data, compute 50/200 SMA, research Fed/inflation macro drivers, produce research report with strategy recommendation.

Done.title: Create project structure
Done.description: Set up /src, /docs, /memory, /dashboard directories and seed files.

Done.title: Build Streamlit kanban dashboard
Done.description: Visualize kanban_board.json in a Streamlit app with status columns.

Done.title: Implement memory manager
Done.description: Create memory_manager.py to read/write error lessons to error_lessons.json.

Done.title: Fetch BTC historical price data
Done.description: Use yfinance or CoinGecko API to download BTC-USD OHLCV data and save to src/data/.

Done.title: Build BTC strategy engine
Done.description: Implement SMA crossover, RSI, MACD, and Bollinger Band strategies in src/strategies.py with pluggable architecture.

Done.title: Build backtesting framework
Done.description: Create src/backtester.py to run strategies against historical data and compute Sharpe ratio, max drawdown, win rate.
